utterances.text: Hello, this is Rajendra calling regarding your personal loan enquiry. This is a quick eligibility check and next-step call. I can continue in English or Hindi. Is this a good time?

Hello, main Rajendra bol raha hoon aapki personal loan enquiry ke regarding. Yeh ek quick eligibility aur next-step call hai. Main English ya Hindi mein continue kar sakta hoon. Kya abhi baat karna convenient hai?
Just to confirm, are you currently looking for a personal loan?
Confirm karne ke liye pooch raha hoon, kya aap abhi personal loan dekh rahe hain?
Which city are you based in?
Are you salaried or self-employed?
What is your approximate monthly income?
Roughly how much loan amount are you looking for?
Aap kis city mein based hain?
Aap salaried hain ya self-employed?
Aapki approximate monthly income kitni hai?
Lagbhag kitne amount ka loan chahiye?
If you do not mind, may I also note your age, work experience or business vintage, and any current monthly EMI?
Agar aap comfortable hon, toh kya main aapki age, work experience ya business vintage, aur current monthly E-M-I bhi note kar loon?
No problem. I can arrange a callback. What time would be best for you?
Koi baat nahi. Main callback arrange kar deta hoon. Aapke liye kaunsa time best rahega?
Understood. I will arrange a callback from a loan specialist.
Samajh gaya. Main loan specialist ka callback arrange kar deta hoon.
Thank you for your time. Please do not share OTP, CVV, full Aadhaar, or full card details on such calls.
Aapke time ke liye dhanyavaad. Kripya OTP, CVV, poora Aadhaar, ya poore card details aisi calls par share na karein.

security_rules: Never ask for OTP, CVV, full card number, or full Aadhaar number.
Use only fictitious sensitive data in demos.
Mask sensitive values in logs and transcripts.
If the user asks to share sensitive details, redirect to secure official channels or a human agent.
Do not promise loan approval on this call.
